name: bird-clawd
description: A read-only daily AI/LLM signal-screening pipeline for X/Twitter, built on birdclaw + bird with headless Claude as the brain.

plugins.name: ai-signal-pipeline
plugins.description: Scaffolds a local, unattended, read-only pipeline that screens X for genuine production-grade AI/LLM developments: a personal markdown digest + a team HTML slide, learning from your comments. Screens, never posts.
